name: brand-forge
description: Build and evaluate brands grounded in cultural authority — strategy, identity, voice, and stewardship — across three working seats: an aspirational Muse (the gravitational pull toward an ideal, a provocation, or a guiding concept), the maker Team (the methodology's roles), and an adversarial named-critic Council (review). Modes are typed commands (/brand-build, /brand-muse, /brand-score, /brand-council, /brand-orient, /brand-stamp); the council runs as 14 parallel isolated critic agents + an orchestrator and the Muse as a generative agent; methodology/evaluation/corpus knowledge are skills; a brand-corpus MCP gives per-instance retrieval; and an advisory brand-lint hook surfaces structural smells on prose artifact writes (it never blocks). Self-contained.

corpus_dir.title: Brand corpus directory
corpus_dir.description: Path to this brand's corpus (documents, tokens, strategy files) for the brand-corpus MCP. Optional — leave unset to run methodology, evaluation, and council without live corpus retrieval.
